issue_summary: return -1 for unknown offsets in ExtendedIntervalsSource. Modify highlighting to work properly with or without offsets (depending on their availability).
javadoc_before: /** This strategy retrieves offsets directly from {@link MatchesIterator}. */
javadoc_after:
/**
 * This strategy retrieves offsets directly from {@link MatchesIterator}, if they are available,
 * otherwise it falls back to using {@link OffsetsFromPositions}.
 */
